core_mechanism: a stochastic contagion/spreading process on a modular (block-structured) network whose propagation is governed by two coupling strengths — a strong intra-block connection density and a weak inter-block density — so that spread is fast within a module and rate-limited across modules
brief_reason: The abstract models the spread of a rumour on a network built from communities characterised by two parameters, within-group and between-group connectivity, and studies how this block topology controls the spreading process.
